name: web-researcher-mcp
description: AI research without the made-up sources — you pick the sites, every citation is real

google_api_key.title: Google Custom Search API Key
google_api_key.description: Get one free at https://console.cloud.google.com (optional if using Brave or other providers)

google_cx.title: Google Custom Search Engine ID
google_cx.description: Create at https://programmablesearchengine.google.com (optional if using Brave or other providers)

brave_api_key.title: Brave Search API Key
brave_api_key.description: Get one free at https://brave.com/search/api/ (optional alternative to Google)

search_provider.title: Search Provider
search_provider.description: Which search engine to use: google, brave, serper, searxng, or searchapi

search_routing.title: Multi-Provider Routing
search_routing.description: Use multiple providers with automatic switching (e.g. brave,google,serper)
